name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.16 unblocks trace recording on macOS 26.x: new recordViaInstrumentsApp tool (41st) wraps the Instruments.app GUI since xcrun xctrace record is broken on this OS. v1.15 was the schema coverage + verify-fix UX release: analyzeMemoryFootprint, analyzeEnergyImpact, analyzeLeakTimeline, summarizeTrace network chain, replayScenario screenshots. v1.14 was the trace-side reliability release. v1.13 shipped summarizeTrace single-call cross-schema synthesis. v1.12 completed reference-tree propagation across countAlive, findRetainers, verifyFix. v1.11 added inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs ref-tree, CLI abandoned-memory mini-table. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 41 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 6 investigation prompts.
